visits.note: Initial visit. Patient presents with complaints of fatigue and increased thirst. HbA1c 7.5, BP 140/90, eGFR 78, LDL 120. Diagnoses include Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, and Hyperlipidemia. Medications include Metformin 500mg BID and Lisinopril 10mg daily.

Follow-up visit. Patient reports worsening fatigue and increased urination. HbA1c 9.1, BP 150/95, eGFR 65, LDL 140. Diagnoses include Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, and early signs of Chronic Kidney Disease. Medications include Metformin 1000mg BID, Lisinopril 20mg daily, and Atorvastatin 20mg daily.

Follow-up visit. Patient reports worsening fatigue, increased urination, and swelling in the legs. HbA1c 8.5, BP 160/100, eGFR 50, LDL 160. Diagnoses include Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Chronic Kidney Disease, and potential Coronary Artery Disease due to high LDL. Medications include Metformin 1500mg BID, Lisinopril 30mg daily, Atorvastatin 40mg daily, and Aspirin 81mg daily.

Follow-up visit. Patient reports improvement in symptoms, but still experiences fatigue and increased urination. HbA1c 8.0, BP 145/90, eGFR 62, LDL 140. Diagnoses remain the same. Medications remain the same.

Follow-up visit. Patient reports continued improvement in symptoms. HbA1c 7.8, BP 130/80, eGFR 70, LDL 120. Diagnoses remain the same, but with a decrease in severity of Chronic Kidney Disease. Medications remain the same.
